The '''R2-R-series astromech droid''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] model produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was used primarily with [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] fighters that were on reconnaissance missions. The R2-R could also download recon data. An R2 unit cost anywhere from 4,000 to 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] based on the R2 unit.

{{Droid-stub}}
